_description: Standing enrollment queue for off-watchlist companies surfaced by the discovery layer. Historically a sighting just got noted in a run file and dead-ended. This file fixes that: feeders append to `pending`; the next run verifies each pending board and either enrolls it (-> watchlist_companies.json + move to `enrolled`) or rejects it (move to `rejected` with a reason so it's never re-evaluated). This is what converts a one-time sighting into permanent daily monitoring.

_feeders.description: Scripts/sources that append to `pending`. All are DISCOVERY FEEDERS (they find companies); the watchlist poller is the durable job source once a company is enrolled.
_feeders.harvest_hn_hiring.py: Monthly. Parses the HN 'Ask HN: Who is hiring?' thread via the Algolia API and extracts (ats, slug) directly from ATS apply links in comments -> directly enrollable. Highest-yield sub-500 source. Run on/after the 1st.
_feeders.poll_remotive.py: Daily. Remotive remote-jobs JSON API. Remotive does NOT expose the ATS link, so it yields NAME-ONLY leads (needs_ats_resolution=true) that the enrollment step must resolve to an ATS before enrolling. (RemoteOK evaluated 2026-06-30 and dropped for data quality.)
_feeders.websearch board dorks: Daily, run by Claude. site:jobs.ashbyhq.com / job-boards.greenhouse.io / jobs.lever.co target-role dorks. Surface unfamiliar companies -> append to pending.

_schema.pending: [{name, ats, slug, source, first_seen, why, [needs_ats_resolution]}] — verify board live + has US-reachable fit-space roles, then enroll or reject. If needs_ats_resolution=true, name-only: resolve the ATS first (site:greenhouse.io OR ashby OR lever <company>).
_schema.enrolled: [{name, ats, slug, enrolled_date, headcount_band}] — audit log; the live entry lives in watchlist_companies.json.
_schema.rejected: [{name, ats, slug, rejected_date, reason, recheck_if_resurfaced}] — don't re-evaluate unless it resurfaces with new roles.

_run_instructions: Each daily run, in Step 1b after reading ATS hits: (1) process every `pending` entry — for name-only leads resolve the ATS first; verify the board (direct ATS API check, or pipeline/verify_workday.py for Workday) is live with US-reachable fit-space roles; look up an approximate headcount_band; then either add it to watchlist_companies.json + move to `enrolled`, or move it to `rejected` with a reason. (2) Run the feeders (harvest_hn_hiring.py monthly, poll_remotive.py daily) + board dorks; append any UNFAMILIAR company (not in watchlist_companies.json, `enrolled`, or `rejected`) to `pending`. (3) Prefer sub-500. Reject Europe/APAC-only boards — their fit roles aren't US-reachable.

enrolled.name: Wispr Flow
enrolled.notes: Voice AI dictation startup. Customer Engagement Manager (Remote US) is a direct fit.

enrolled.name: Swiftly
enrolled.notes: Transit data SaaS platform. Implementation Manager (SaaS, US) and Customer Training & Adoption Specialist are direct fits.

enrolled.name: FAR.AI
enrolled.notes: AI safety research nonprofit, Berkeley. Current roles are ops-adjacent (Business Operations Associate, Senior Programs & Strategy Manager, both Remote US) but not strong title matches — mostly research/eng heavy. Enrolled per the explicit 'FAR.AI-type org' callout in _websearch_sources; watch for better title fits as new reqs post.

enrolled.name: Nimble Gravity
enrolled.notes: AI growth consultancy (Denver HQ, LATAM+US remote team). AI Enablement & Adoption Manager and Client Engagement Manager (both US Remote) are strong fits.

rejected.name: TeamBridge
rejected.reason: Board live but 0 open jobs on 2026-06-30 — nothing to monitor.

rejected.name: UniCourt
rejected.reason: Live but 4 jobs, 0 in target fit-space (legal data co).

rejected.name: Weaviate
rejected.reason: Live (vector DB) but 0 fit-space roles; dev-infra co that rarely hires Aneesh-type roles.

rejected.name: Gladly

rejected.name: Lago
rejected.reason: Live (open-source billing, Paris HQ); fit roles (FDE, Customer Support Engineer, Technical Account Executive, Solutions Engineer) are ALL Europe-remote / France — not US-reachable. Re-check if a US-remote role opens.

rejected.name: Eagle
rejected.reason: Live (9 jobs) but only fit role is a single coding-heavy Forward Deployed Engineer (NYC) at an unclear-domain engineering co; not a clear support-ops/CS fit. Re-check if CS/implementation roles appear.

rejected.name: Clerky
rejected.reason: Resurfaced via Remotive again (same listing as 2026-06-30 rejection): resolved to ashby/clerky, still only 1 job (worldwide 'Customer Operations & Writing Specialist' blend) — too thin/marginal to monitor. Re-check if more CS/ops roles appear.

rejected.name: Aureliussystems
rejected.reason: Live (20 jobs) but defense-tech/directed-energy cUAS company — all roles are engineering/robotics/hardware. The one keyword match, 'Lead, Forward Deployed Engineer', is onsite SF at a defense contractor: not a CS/support-ops fit, and the domain implies clearance requirements Aneesh doesn't have. Re-check only if a clearly non-defense support/CS role appears.

rejected.name: Close
rejected.reason: Surfaced via WebSearch Ashby board dork (listing showed a Customer Success Associate role). Verified live board 2026-07-01: only 5 jobs, all eng/marketing (Backend SWE, SRE, Support SWE, Frontend SWE, Agentic Growth Marketing Lead) — the CS Associate listing had already closed. Re-check if a CS/support role reopens.

rejected.name: Emergent Labs
rejected.reason: Live (37 jobs) but the only fit-space role, Manager - Technical Account Management, is based in Bangalore — not US-reachable. Rest of board is Enterprise AE and eng roles.

rejected.name: TrustArc
rejected.reason: Live (3 jobs) but both Technical Account Manager roles are based in the Philippines (Cebu City); the only US role is Account Executive, which isn't a fit-space title.

rejected.name: Cognite
rejected.reason: Guessed Lever slug was wrong (404) - actual ATS is Greenhouse (job-boards.greenhouse.io/cognite, 50 jobs). Industrial AI/IoT platform, but all fit-space titles (Account Executive/Manager, Solutions Consultant) are Europe/Japan-based; no US-reachable role.
